title: Apex Pro Carbon Pickleball Set: Precision & Power Duo
originalBodyHtml:
Command the court with the Apex Carbon Fiber Set, where sophisticated engineering meets uncompromising performance. Crafted for players who prioritize tactical precision, the T300 carbon fiber surface delivers an unmatched tactile response, allowing for effortless spin and surgical shot placement.

Experience the perfect balance of power and finesse with our 14mm honeycomb core, designed to absorb impact while maximizing energy return. From the ergonomic moisture-wicking grip to the specialized noise-reduction frame, every element of this professional-grade kit is refined to keep you at the top of your game through every rally.

Performance Highlights

  • T300 Carbon Fiber Surface: Engineered for elite spin control and exceptional ball feel.
  • 14mm Responsive Core: A high-density honeycomb structure that minimizes vibration and expands the sweet spot.
  • Advanced Vibration Dampening: Proprietary acoustic engineering ensures a quieter, more focused strike.
  • Contoured Performance Grip: Ergonomically designed to reduce hand fatigue and enhance paddle maneuverability.
  • The Complete Elite Kit: Includes two premium paddles, four tournament-grade balls, and a durable carry case.

Quick Specs

  • Surface: Premium T300 Carbon Fiber
  • Core: 14mm Polypropylene Honeycomb
  • Weight: Ultra-Responsive 7.4 oz
  • Dimensions: 15.75" x 7.87"
  • Grip Length: 4.8" Professional Taper
proposedBodyHtml:
Command the court with the Apex Carbon Fiber Set, where sophisticated engineering meets uncompromising performance. Crafted for players who prioritize tactical precision, the T300 carbon fiber surface delivers an unmatched tactile response, allowing for effortless spin and surgical shot placement.

  • T300 Carbon Fiber Surface: Engineered for elite spin control and exceptional ball feel.
  • 14mm Responsive Core: A high-density honeycomb structure that minimizes vibration and expands the sweet spot.
  • Advanced Vibration Dampening: Proprietary acoustic engineering ensures a quieter, more focused strike.
  • Contoured Performance Grip: Ergonomically designed to reduce hand fatigue and enhance paddle maneuverability.
  • The Complete Elite Kit: Includes two premium paddles, four tournament-grade balls, and a durable carry case.
  • Surface: Premium T300 Carbon Fiber

Who it's for: Beginners and rec players doing regular drills or everyday games.

title: Apex Pro Outdoor Pickleballs | Elite Tournament 4-Pack
originalBodyHtml:
Elevate your competitive edge with the Apex Pro Outdoor Pickleballs, engineered for the athlete who demands absolute consistency. These balls bridge the gap between raw power and refined control, offering a professional-grade response that transforms every rally into a display of precision.

Crafted to excel on demanding hardcourt surfaces, the Apex Pro features a sophisticated 40-hole aerodynamic pattern that cuts through wind for an unwavering flight path. From the finesse of a soft drop to the intensity of a baseline drive, experience the reliability and durability required to dominate the outdoor circuit.

Performance Highlights

  • Wind-Resistant Precision: 40 strategically placed holes ensure a stable, true flight even in breezy conditions.
  • Tournament-Grade Resilience: Advanced TPE construction prevents cracking and maintains shape through high-velocity play.
  • Predictable Surface Response: Engineered for outdoor courts to provide a consistent, reliable bounce every time.
  • High-Definition Tracking: The vibrant, high-contrast finish allows for rapid visual acquisition across all lighting conditions.
  • Calibrated Weighting: Balanced for a professional feel that maximizes shot feedback and tactical control.

Quick Specs

  • Material: Professional-Grade Thermoplastic Elastomer (TPE)
  • Hole Configuration: 40 Precision-Drilled Holes
  • Size: 74mm Regulation Diameter
  • Weight: 26g – 28g (USAPA Standard)
  • Package Includes: 4 Premium Outdoor Pickleballs

title: Apex Pro Silicone Pickleball Grip Sleeve | Precision & Control
originalBodyHtml:
Redefine your connection to the court with the Apex Pro Silicone Grip Sleeve. Engineered for players who demand absolute precision, this high-elasticity sleeve provides a refined, tactile interface that traditional overgrips simply cannot replicate. Experience a more responsive touch on every dink, reset, and drive with a grip designed for the elite competitor.

Crafted from premium-grade silicone with a sophisticated honeycomb architecture, this sleeve offers exceptional moisture management and slip resistance. It seamlessly integrates with your paddle handle, offering an ergonomic layer that absorbs vibration while protecting your gear from the rigors of professional play.

Performance Highlights

  • Precision Honeycomb Traction: Delivers a consistent, non-slip surface for total control in high-humidity conditions.
  • Vibration Dampening Technology: Reduces handle feedback to minimize fatigue during long tournament days.
  • Ultra-Slim Profile: Maintains the original handle geometry without adding unnecessary bulk or weight.
  • Resilient Silicone Shield: Protects your underlying grip from sweat, friction, and environmental wear.
  • Universal Compatibility: Engineered to fit all standard pickleball paddles with a secure, seamless finish.

Quick Specs

  • Material: Premium High-Elasticity Silicone
  • Texture: Hexagonal Traction Pattern
  • Fit: Universal Standard Handle Compatibility
  • Maintenance: Washable and UV-Resistant
  • Installation: Slide-on compression fit

originalBodyHtml:

Engineered from premium Carbon Fiber PU with a sophisticated matte finish, this bag offers the perfect balance of weather-resistant durability and refined style, ensuring your equipment remains protected while you maintain a professional edge.

Optimized for superior organization, the Elite features a dedicated padded compartment for your paddles and a high-capacity interior for essential gear and apparel. From tournament travel to daily practice, its ergonomic design and reinforced construction provide the comfort and longevity required for peak performance in any environment.

title: ColorGuard Edge Shield | Premium Pickleball Paddle Protection Tape
originalBodyHtml:
Protect your performance investment with the ColorGuard Edge Shield. Crafted from high-grade, impact-resistant PU, this premium tape provides a resilient barrier against court-inflicted scuffs and frame wear, ensuring your paddle stays in peak condition from the first dink to the final match point.

Engineered for the elite player, this versatile 3-pack features varying widths to ensure a seamless, custom fit for any paddle profile. The ultra-flexible material contours effortlessly to your frame, delivering a clean, professional finish that enhances durability without altering your swing weight or balance.

Performance Highlights

  • High-Impact PU Defense: Absorbs court contact to prevent frame chipping and surface scratches.
  • Precision Contour Flex: Ultra-flexible material conforms to curved edges for a bubble-free, professional application.
  • Featherweight Design: Provides maximum durability while maintaining your paddle’s original balance and swing weight.
  • Universal Fit: Includes three distinct widths to accommodate different core thicknesses and edge guard styles.
  • Sleek Pro Aesthetic: Delivers a low-profile, premium look in classic performance colors.

Quick Specs

  • Material: Premium Flexible Polyurethane (PU)
  • Length: 76 cm (29.92 in) per strip
  • Widths: 2.0cm, 2.3cm, and 2.6cm included
  • Quantity: 3-Piece Multi-Width Performance Pack
  • Colors: Stealth Black, Arctic White, and Crimson Red

originalBodyHtml:

Crafted from professional-grade, waterproof chloroprene rubber, the softback construction offers a snug, form-fitting profile that slides easily into your court bag. title: Photochromic Pickleball Glasses – UV400 Lightweight Sports Eyewear
originalBodyHtml:
Designed for pickleball players who compete in changing light conditions, these photochromic sports glasses help you see clearly indoors, outdoors, and during bright sunny matches. The lightweight frame, adjustable nose pads, and protective wraparound design make them ideal for fast-paced rallies, training sessions, and everyday court use.

Product Description

Upgrade your on-court vision with these photochromic pickleball glasses, built to adapt to changing sunlight and help reduce glare during play. The lenses automatically adjust based on UV intensity, while UV400 protection helps shield your eyes from harmful rays during outdoor matches.

Made with a lightweight TR frame and durable polycarbonate lenses, these glasses are comfortable enough for extended wear without feeling heavy or restrictive. The adjustable nose pads and secure fit help keep them in place during quick movement, making them a practical choice for competitive and recreational pickleball players alike.

Key Features

  • Photochromic lenses – automatically adjust to changing light conditions

  • UV400 eye protection – helps block harmful UVA and UVB rays

  • Lightweight design – comfortable for long matches and training sessions

  • Secure sport fit – stays in place during fast movement and quick directional changes

  • Adjustable nose pads – improved comfort for different face shapes

  • Wide protective coverage – helps shield eyes from wind, dust, sunlight, and court distractions

  • Unisex design – suitable for both men and women

Specifications

  • Product type: Pickleball sports glasses

  • Lens type: Photochromic

  • Protection: UV400

  • Frame material: TR

  • Lens material: Polycarbonate

  • Lens height: Approx. 5 cm

  • Lens width: Approx. 15.5 cm

  • Weight: Approx. 29 g

  • Fit: Unisex adults

  • Use for: Pickleball, outdoor training, running, and other sports activities

Ideal For

  • Outdoor pickleball matches

  • Bright and changing weather conditions

  • Players looking for lightweight eye protection

  • Training, tournaments, and casual court sessions

Note

Photochromic lens changing speed may vary depending on sunlight intensity, UV exposure, and temperature.

Designed for pickleball players who compete in changing light conditions, these photochromic sports glasses help you see clearly indoors, outdoors, and during bright sunny matches. The lightweight frame, adjustable nose pads, and protective wraparound design make them ideal for fast-paced rallies, training sessions, and everyday court use.

title: PowerEdge Pickleball Lead Tape Strips — 10 Pack
originalBodyHtml:
Upgrade your pickleball paddle in seconds with PowerEdge Lead Tape Strips. Each pre-cut 3g bar is engineered to enhance your paddle's swing weight, giving you more power behind every drive and greater stability on off-center hits — without changing your paddle.

Why PowerEdge?

Whether you're a competitive player chasing that extra edge or a recreational player looking to dial in your feel, these flexible adhesive strips let you fully customize your paddle's balance and performance to match your playing style.

Key Features

  • Instant power boost — each 3g strip increases swing weight for harder, faster shots

  • Flexible & conforming — bends easily around curved paddle edges for a seamless fit

  • Strong adhesive hold — stays locked in place even through intense rallies

  • Repositionable — reusable design lets you experiment with placement until your setup feels perfect

  • Versatile placement — apply to the top edge for power, side edges for a larger sweet spot, or lower corners for enhanced control

Specifications

  • Material: Lead + PVC

  • Strip size: 5 × 1 cm

  • Weight per strip: 3g

  • Color: Black

  • Quantity: 10 strips per pack

     Safety Note: Contains lead material. Avoid prolonged skin contact and wash hands after handling. Keep away from children.
proposedBodyHtml:
Upgrade your pickleball paddle in seconds with PowerEdge Lead Tape Strips. Each pre-cut 3g bar is engineered to enhance your paddle's swing weight, giving you more power behind every drive and greater stability on off-center hits — without changing your paddle.

  • Instant power boost — each 3g strip increases swing weight for harder, faster shots
  • Flexible & conforming — bends easily around curved paddle edges for a seamless fit
  • Strong adhesive hold — stays locked in place even through intense rallies
  • Repositionable — reusable design lets you experiment with placement until your setup feels perfect
  • Versatile placement — apply to the top edge for power, side edges for a larger sweet spot, or lower corners for enhanced control
  • Material: Lead + PVC

Who it's for: Beginners and rec players doing regular drills or everyday games.

title: Premium Pickleball Tote Bag with Adjustable Shoulder Strap
originalBodyHtml:
Carry your game essentials in style with this premium pickleball tote bag. Designed for everyday use, it offers practical storage for paddles, accessories, and personal items while maintaining a sleek and sporty look.

Made from durable PU material, this bag is lightweight, water-resistant, scratch-resistant, and comfortable to carry. It fits up to 2 pickleball paddles and features an internal zip pocket for smaller valuables, plus two side pockets for items like a water bottle or umbrella.

The spacious design makes it a great choice not only for pickleball, but also for tennis, squash, gym sessions, travel, and everyday use. The removable adjustable strap adds extra carrying comfort and flexibility on the go.

title: Pro-Cool Performance Compression Wrist Sleeve
originalBodyHtml:
Elevate your on-court performance with the Pro-Cool Performance Compression Wrist Sleeve. Engineered for the modern pickleball player, this sleeve utilizes advanced cooling technology and high-tension elastic weaving to provide consistent support without restricting your natural range of motion.

Designed to manage moisture during the most intense rallies, the breathable polyester blend wicks sweat instantly, keeping your grip dry and your focus sharp. Whether you're drilling third-shot drops or competing in a tournament, this low-profile guard delivers the comfort and stability required for elite play.

Performance Highlights

  • Instant Cooling Technology: Regulates skin temperature during high-intensity matches.
  • Advanced Moisture Management: Rapid-dry fabric prevents sweat from reaching your paddle grip.
  • 4-Way Elastic Weaving: Provides a secure, ergonomic fit that moves with your wrist.
  • Low-Profile Comfort: Sleek, lightweight design fits comfortably under apparel or on its own.
  • Durable Compression: Retains shape and support through repetitive athletic movements.

Quick Specs

  • Material: Premium Moisture-Wicking Polyester Blend
  • Fit: Unisex Ergonomic Compression
  • Support Level: Lightweight & Flexible
  • Recommended For: Pickleball, Tennis, and High-Intensity Training

title: Pro-Series Carbon Fiber Pickleball Paddle | 16mm Control Core
originalBodyHtml:
Elevate your court presence with a paddle engineered for the perfect marriage of power and precision. Featuring a responsive carbon fiber face and a high-density 16mm honeycomb core, this paddle offers a sophisticated feel that absorbs impact while delivering consistent energy return on every drive.

Designed to meet standard tournament dimensions, its lightweight construction ensures effortless maneuverability at the kitchen line. The ergonomic, cushioned grip provides superior moisture-wicking properties, allowing for extended play sessions with maximum comfort and a secure, non-slip hold.

Performance Highlights

  • Carbon Fiber Face: Enhanced surface texture for superior spin control and ball feel.
  • 16mm Honeycomb Core: Thick-core technology designed to dampen vibration and enlarge the sweet spot.
  • Aerodynamic Maneuverability: Optimized weight distribution for faster hands and reactive volleys.
  • Premium Ergonomic Grip: Perforated, cushioned handle for elite comfort and reduced fatigue.
  • Tournament-Ready Geometry: Precision-engineered to standard competition sizing for consistent playability.

Quick Specs

  • Face: Premium Carbon Fiber
  • Core: 16mm Polypropylene Honeycomb
  • Weight: 220–230g (Mid-weight Performance)
  • Dimensions: 414mm x 188mm x 16mm
  • Grip: Cushioned, Moisture-Wicking Synthetic

title: Pro-Series Moisture-Wicking Headband Duo | Premium Pickleball Gear
originalBodyHtml:
Maintain absolute focus when the game is on the line. The Pro-Series Headband Duo is engineered for the high-intensity demands of competitive pickleball, ensuring that perspiration never interferes with your vision or your next winning shot.

Crafted from our signature technical cationic fabric, these headbands offer a refined, ultra-soft feel with a sophisticated matte finish. The lightweight, breathable construction wicks moisture instantly, providing a distraction-free, zero-slip fit that stays secure through every lateral sprint and overhead smash.

Performance Highlights

  • Precision Moisture Management: Specialized fibers draw sweat away from the brow for crystal-clear optics during long rallies.
  • Dynamic Stay-Put Fit: Tailored elasticity ensures the band remains perfectly positioned during explosive court movements.
  • Technical Cationic Blend: Ultra-lightweight material facilitates maximum airflow and rapid evaporation to keep you cool.
  • Ergonomic Contoured Design: Engineered to provide a pressure-free fit for all-day comfort and hair management.
  • Elite Durability: High-tensile construction maintains shape and performance through countless matches and wash cycles.

Quick Specs

  • Material: Premium Cationic Technical Blend
  • Dimensions: 12.5 cm x 25 cm
  • Optimized Fit: 54–58 cm circumference
  • Pack Size: Set of 2 High-Performance Headbands
  • Maintenance: Machine washable and quick-drying

title: Professional Pickleball Backpack with Separate Shoe Compartment
originalBodyHtml:
Pickleball Backpack – Large Capacity Waterproof Sports Bag

Keep all your game essentials in one place with this practical and spacious pickleball backpack. Designed with multiple compartments, it helps you neatly organize paddles, shoes, clothing, towels, water bottles, and other accessories for training, matches, or travel.

The bag features dedicated side pockets for paddles with secure zipper closure and protective lining to help keep your equipment in place and protected. A separate ventilated shoe compartment keeps footwear away from the rest of your gear, while the roomy main compartment offers enough space for everyday sports essentials.

Made from durable waterproof nylon, this backpack is built for regular use in different weather conditions. Adjustable padded shoulder straps and dual carry handles provide comfortable carrying whether you're heading to the court, gym, or tournament.

Suitable for pickleball, tennis, badminton, and other racket sports.

Key features

  • Large-capacity design with multiple storage compartments

  • Separate paddle pockets with zipper closure

  • Protective inner lining for added equipment protection

  • Ventilated shoe compartment

  • Durable waterproof nylon material

  • Adjustable padded shoulder straps

  • Dual carry handles for easy transport

  • Suitable for pickleball, tennis, badminton, and more

Specifications

  • Brand: Perfk

  • Material: Nylon

  • Size: 28 x 21.5 x 43 cm

title: Quick-Dry Pickleball Sports Towel – Ultra-Soft Microfiber Court Towel
originalBodyHtml:
Stay dry, comfortable, and match-ready with a lightweight microfiber towel made for pickleball, training, and everyday court use.

This quick-dry pickleball sports towel is designed to absorb sweat fast and dry much quicker than standard towels. Made from soft and lightweight microfiber fabric, it is easy to carry in your pickleball bag and perfect for staying fresh during matches, practice sessions, gym workouts, or outdoor activities.

Product Description

Keep your hands, face, and gear dry with this ultra-soft pickleball towel built for active players. The microfiber material offers strong absorbency while remaining compact and lightweight, making it ideal for long court sessions and travel.

Its space-saving design makes it easy to pack into a small pouch or sports bag without adding bulk. Whether you're playing pickleball, heading to the gym, traveling, or using it as an everyday towel, this versatile quick-dry towel is a practical essential for active lifestyles.

Key Features

  • Quick-dry microfiber fabric for fast moisture evaporation

  • Super absorbent design helps remove sweat and water quickly

  • Lightweight and compact for easy carrying in a paddle bag or backpack

  • Ultra-soft texture for comfortable everyday use

  • Multi-purpose use for pickleball, gym, yoga, travel, swimming, and outdoor activities

  • Durable and reusable material designed for repeated washing

Specifications

  • Product type: Pickleball sports towel

  • Material: Microfiber fabric

  • Composition: 15% nylon, 85% polyester

  • Size: 40 × 80 cm

  • Colors: Grey, Sky Blue, Navy, Black

  • Feature: Quick-dry
